title: Hole Filler Mod
body:
# Hole Filler Mod ### Reclaim terrain in seconds Throw it. Keep building. Let HFM remove craters, trenches, and blast damage while you move on.
Creative No placement blocks required.
Survival Uses real resources from your inventory or linked storage.

## Why Download HFM - Fast hole recovery for survival bases and multiplayer servers - Multiple filler types for terrain, fluids, light control, and precision fills - Built-in safety limits and configurable behavior - Item Pack + Inventory Sync reduce inventory clutter ## Standout Features ### Undo (15 seconds) Made a mistake or changed your mind? Break any placed Curing Block within the undo window and the hole is re-emptied, with resources returned. ### Smart Hole Filler Smart HF reads nearby terrain and tries to place matching blocks automatically. It also includes: - **Preserve Mode**: keeps premium blocks for visible surfaces and uses a cheaper preserve block below - **Similar Blocks**: substitutes close alternatives when the exact block is missing - **One-Way Blocks**: controlled fallback chains for predictable substitutions ### Instant Cure Happy with the result? Use an empty hand and right-click a Curing Block **3 times** to cure immediately. ### Item Pack + Inventory Sync Store all Hole Fillers in one pack, switch fillers quickly, and link a container so throws can pull resources from storage instead of your hotbar. ### Hole Maker A charge-based throwable that creates holes on impact. Scale power with Catalyst to control how much terrain is removed. ## Quick Start 1. Craft a Hole Filler (or Hole Filler Pack). 2. Throw into a hole. 3. Let Curing Blocks fill and convert. 4. Undo or instant-cure based on what you want. ## Walkthrough --- Recipes and full config options: See the Website. ## Links - Discord: [https://discord.gg/ype5BrNFSy](https://discord.gg/ype5BrNFSy) - Website: [https://danielthedev.com/hole_filler_mod](https://danielthedev.com/hole_filler_mod) - Support: [https://www.buymeacoffee.com/DanielThomas](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/DanielThomas) - [All Feature Updates](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2QNRLKIf2rdp0LaoXKKPZCIE6ZOh3jUQ)
